texto: You are worth everything that nature can give you.And I pray to whatever I believe in that you find your happiness. You find pride in yourself.And you find true love.And you can look at that person and understand the impact that have had in your life.Because you have surprised me with every step you took.And if letting you go means that I love you.Then I love you.Have fun out there.
explicacao: Citação de Philippe Renaud sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “You are worth everything that nature can give you.And I pray to whatever I believe in that you fi…” articula autoestima, love, moving-on em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como moving-on.
